Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-09 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
Today's data shows two exceptional long-term momentum performers at the top of the ranking. EACO leads with a score of 94.1 and rank #1, displaying extraordinary returns of 1,955% over 10 years and 465% over 5 years, while maintaining all four major moving average supports (SMA30/50/100/200). CLMT ranks second with similarly impressive fundamentals including a 6.22x return over 5 years and perfect ratio passes (5 out of 5), though its 10-year return of 677% is notably lower than EACO's. Both stocks show "clean" momentum signals and "strong_buy" classifications, indicating sustained positive acceleration across multiple timeframes rather than short-term spikes. A key distinction emerges in their diversification profiles: EACO demonstrates significantly outperformance versus SPY (1,704% over 10 years) and shows weak correlations with sector ETFs, while CLMT's relative performance versus benchmarks is materially lower, particularly over the 10-year horizon. Both tickers pass all moving average filters and show normal volatility characteristics, suggesting the ranking engine identifies them as structurally sound long-term positions rather than speculative moves.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
